observations.assessment: the CI db-tests job did exactly what it was built for: caught an ordering defect the pure model could not

failures.DH-DB-2_and_3: assertion shape: drizzle wraps duplicate-key as DrizzleQueryError 'Failed query...' with Duplicate entry on cause
failures.DH-DB-4_and_6: test arity bug: g1()/g2() helpers took no params; overrides like g1({startUtc}) were silently ignored (test files excluded from tsc)
failures.DH-DB-7: REAL PRODUCTION BUG: applyMlbScheduleSyncPlan ran inserts before updates; in the incident shape the un-adopted legacy row still occupied (date,teams,gameNumber=1) so Game 1's insert collided on games_matchup_unique and the makeup game failed to materialize. The pure test helper applied updates first, masking it locally.

fixes.production: applyMlbScheduleSyncPlan now applies updates BEFORE inserts (frees storage keys) + one retry pass for deferred inserts (transient concurrent-worker occupancy); second failure remains an applyError
fixes.tests: g1/g2 accept Partial<MlbProviderGame> overrides; expectDuplicateKey helper matches message+cause+code

observations.1_same_pk_reschedule: syncMlbSchedule now loads rows date-unbounded by provider pk (second SELECT, merged); planner supports SyncFieldUpdate.gameDate moves with a 'moved' warning; a date move resolves postponed->upcoming (guard exception); automates the manual UPDATE run in production for pk 824766
observations.2_status_alignment: mlbScoreRefresh mapMlbStatus Suspended -> 'suspended' (was 'postponed', which broke mlbPostponedTracker's suspended-resume scan and ping-ponged vs the sync); listGames feed filter now excludes postponed AND suspended explicitly; types widened
observations.3_renumber_robustness: applyMlbScheduleSyncPlan two-phase updates: contested key-moving updates parked on unique negative gameNumbers then re-applied with PlannedUpdate.finalGameNumber (fixes swap deadlock); planner lone-sibling guard: solo-group payloads cannot renumber or unflag a stamped sibling row
observations.4_records: docs/runbooks/2026-07-17-migration-journal-repair.sql (verified object pre-checks, real sha256 hashes, journal INSERTs for 0112/0113/0114, rollback); final report + ledger updated
